creator: freebsd@beardz.net
text:
On 25/05/2011 15:45, Jase Thew wrote:
> On 25/05/2011 15:01, Frederic Culot wrote:
>> Hi Jase and Masahiro,
>>
>> thanks for submitting and reviewing the patch.
>> I believe there is a small mistake regarding the p5-POE-Component-IRC
>> dependency.
>> Indeed, your patch states the 6.52 version is needed whereas the
>> minimum version
>> needed seems to be 6.68 as stated here:
>>
>> http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/HINRIK/POE-Component-Server-IRC-1.48/Makefile.PL
>>
>>
>> Unfortunately the version of p5-POE-Component-IRC we have in ports is
>> still 6.54,
>> so we will have to wait for this dependency to be updated before
>> committing your
>> patch.
>>
>> Thanks,
>> culot@
>
> Hi Frederic,
>
> You're looking at the requirements for POE-Component-Server-IRC v1.48
> which was released last night. The patch is for POE-Component-Server-IRC
> v1.47 which has a dependancy against p5-POE-Component-IRC v6.51.
>
> Regards,
>
> Jase.

Hi Frederic,

Sorry, please disregard my last mail - you are absolutely correct. I'm 
confusing myself with the release of v1.49 which was last night.

I broke my own rule of replying to emails before I've had my first 
coffee of the day and am once again paying for that mistake :)

Regards,

Jase.
